description: Airflow fixtures evaluated for room sizing, efficiency, motor quality, and control flexibility.

attributes.label: Room Size (sq ft)
attributes.explanation: Blade span and CFM should match room size to avoid dead zones or overpowered airflow.

attributes.label: Airflow (CFM)
attributes.explanation: CFM is the primary indicator of real airflow performance.

attributes.label: Motor Type
attributes.explanation: DC motors are quieter and more efficient than AC motors.

attributes.label: Mount Type
attributes.explanation: Mount type must match ceiling height and slope.

attributes.label: Damp/Wet Rating
attributes.explanation: Outdoor or humid rooms require damp- or wet-rated fixtures.

wayfair: dry, damp or wet location listed

watch_out_factors.title: Ceiling Height Clearance
watch_out_factors.description: Verify blade-to-floor clearance and required downrod length before ordering.

watch_out_factors.title: Fan + Light Compatibility
watch_out_factors.description: Some fans include non-replaceable LED modules; confirm serviceability and color temperature.

buyer_guide_key_points: CFM matters more than blade count.
DC motors are usually quieter and more efficient.
Mount type must fit ceiling height and slope.
contractor_questions: What downrod length gives safe blade clearance in this room?
Is the existing ceiling box fan-rated or does it need replacement?
Do we need separate fan/light wall controls?
